summary: The diff implements all three requirements: ContactInquiryForm removal from Contact page, Tally form integration, and backend contact inquiry endpoint cleanup. The implementation is complete and matches the BuildRequest specifications.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module added to handle data migration from old actor state to new state without contactInquiries
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not request a migration module or data migration functionality. REQ-3 only requested removal/deprecation of the backend endpoint and cleanup of ContactInquiry type, but did not specify creating a migration system.
